# Rows marked [CONFIRMED] below are grounded in publicly-released press releases
# and can be cross-checked via the source_url + source_page.
# Rows marked [ILLUSTRATIVE] are plausible industry estimates used as placeholder
# data so the Benchmarks UI has something to display. Replace them with verified
# figures from the cited source before relying on any value for a real decision.

# consolidated figure. The authoritative source for per-insurer personal-lines

# regulator filings — the segmented [ILLUSTRATIVE] rows below are placeholders to
# be replaced with those verified values.
